@graph.name: Jaguar models fitted with the Ingenium 2.0 Diesel

mainEntity.name: How much does a Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned Ingenium 2.0 diesel typically costs £3,500–£5,800 supply only [JAG‑QUOTE], varying by power output and specification. Fitting adds £650–£910 depending on labour rates.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Ingenium 2.0 diesel scores 3/5 for reliability [JAG‑VERIFIED], with 88% confidence based on 590 UK enquiries and specialist reports. Post‑2019 engines are significantly improved.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common Ingenium 2.0 diesel failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most common failure is timing‑chain stretch and tensioner wear, typically appearing between 60,000–120,000 miles — often accompanied by a cold‑start rattle.

mainEntity.name: Which Jaguar models use the Ingenium 2.0 diesel?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Ingenium 2.0 diesel powers the Jaguar XE, XF, F‑Pace and E‑Pace — a range of executive saloons and SUVs.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel the same as Land Rover's version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — it's the same 2.0‑litre four‑cylinder diesel engine, used across both brands with identical parts and shared failure patterns. Pre‑2019 examples are the ones to watch.

hero.tagPill: Jaguar • Ingenium 2.0 Diesel • Diesel • 2.0L I4 Turbo • 2015–present
hero.h1: Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 Diesel Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Jaguar Ingenium 2.0 diesel is a modern, efficient four-cylinder — but early timing‑chain failures are a well‑known weakness. Backed by 590+ real UK enquiries in 2025 [JAG‑VERIFIED].

verdictRating.confidence: 88% — based on 590 UK enquiries and cross‑referenced specialist rebuild reports.

rows.score: 8 (Failures are often all‑or‑nothing; timing chain stretch can destroy the engine)
12 (Available but with some wait; JLR‑specific parts not always same‑day)
4 (Reconditioned cost against lowest host value (~£7,000) exceeds 60% threshold)

verdictRating.oneLineVerdict: The Ingenium diesel is efficient and refined when new — but timing‑chain stretch before 70k is a real risk — buy 2019+ or budget for chain replacement.
verdictRating.bestFor: High‑mileage drivers who service strictly on schedule and avoid short trips.
verdictRating.avoidIf: Budget buyers looking at pre‑2019 cars with no documented chain history.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers the Land Rover Discovery Sport, Evoque, Velar and Defender → [link].

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting an Ingenium 2.0 diesel typically takes 10–14 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [JAG‑QUOTE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across Jaguar and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access.
